name: Posted Docs. With No Inc. Buf.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted purchase and sales document that does not have an incoming document record.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the posted purchase and sales document that does not have an incoming document record.

fields.name: First Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the first posting transaction on the posted purchase and sales document that does not have an incoming document record.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.
